title: Four tmx enhancements: bookmarks, color tags, quick-last, window kill

questions.prompt: All four features in scope? Any you want to drop or defer?
questions.description: Bookmarked dirs, per-session color tags, tmx --last, window-level kill.
questions.recommendedAnswer: All four. Ship together as v1.3.0.

questions.description: The Ctrl-l palette shows named colors. How many should there be?
questions.recommendedAnswer: 8 colors: red, green, blue, yellow, magenta, cyan, white, gray — plus a '(none)' option to clear. Enough variety without being overwhelming.

questions.prompt: Keybind for toggling bookmarks in the directory picker?
questions.description: Currently unbound keys in the dir picker: Ctrl-p. Ctrl-b is tmux prefix so avoid it.

questions.prompt: Keybind for color tagging in the main picker?
questions.description: Ctrl-l is currently free. Ctrl-c would conflict with SIGINT.

questions.prompt: How should the color tag appear on session lines?
questions.description: Options: a colored dot BEFORE the status marker, a colored bar/dash, or just color the session name text.
questions.recommendedAnswer: A colored dot (●) placed BEFORE the status marker (●/◎), so both are visible. e.g. '● ● my-session  1w 0c' for a current session tagged red.

options.label: Color the session name text itself

questions.recommendedAnswer: --last only. Short flags are meh for tmx since there are so few flags and --last is self-documenting. Covers the use case without flag proliferation.

questions.prompt: When should the MRU file be updated?
questions.description: Options: on every attach_normal/attach_detach_others call, or only from tmx (not external tmux attaches).
questions.recommendedAnswer: Only from tmx attaches — MRU tracking in attach_normal/attach_detach_others. External attaches (outside tmx) won't be tracked, which is fine.
